title: JWT Authentication Handler
description: Issue and verify JWTs for multi-tenant access. ECDSA P-256 signing, RBAC with MSP/security/compliance roles, short-lived access tokens, refresh rotation. ALL types, interfaces, and logic must be in a SINGLE Go file with NO imports from example.com or yourmodule.
